description: CompositionYellow and blue bold checked full-sleeve shirt, made of 100% cotton, has two buttoned pockets on each chest with brand name printed above the left one, a full length buttoned placket, mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, and a curved hemFittingSlimWash careMachine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeUse warm ironGo bold with this soothing checked shirt in blue and black this autumn. Pair it with corduroys and suede boots or denims and slippers for unparalleled casual cool, while the full sleeves keep the winter chill at bay.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
